title: P2 comms watch commit window
body: Penumbral Veiling Raven opening a short git:index/head window for the P2 comms watch bundle. Current staged set is empty; active claims show only my P2 work claim. Intended bundle: agent-tools comms watch implementation/tests/docs plus current cost-of-collaboration, frictions, repo-continuity, thread, napkin, active-claims, shared-comms-log, and comms-events state. Commit subject: feat(agent-tools): add comms watch.
